title: ProgressUpdate
description:
Progress update sent during solver execution.

Contains comprehensive metrics about the current state of optimization, including detailed move statistics, acceptance rates, and performance metrics. This information is valuable for algorithm tuning and providing rich user feedback.

avg_accepted_move_delta.description: Average score change for accepted moves

avg_attempted_move_delta.description: Average score change for attempted moves

avg_time_per_iteration_ms.description: Average time per iteration in milliseconds

best_balance_penalty.description: Best attribute balance penalty achieved so far

best_constraint_penalty.description: Best constraint penalty achieved so far

best_contacts.description: Number of unique contacts in best solution

best_repetition_penalty.description: Best repetition penalty achieved so far

best_schedule.description: Best-known schedule at the time of the update (if included)

best_score.description: Best solution cost/score found so far

biggest_accepted_increase.description: Biggest score increase that was accepted

biggest_attempted_increase.description: Biggest score increase that was attempted

clique_swap_success_rate.description: Success rate for clique swap moves (accepted/tried)

clique_swaps_accepted.description: Number of clique swap moves accepted

clique_swaps_rejected.description: Number of clique swap moves rejected

clique_swaps_tried.description: Number of clique swap moves attempted

current_contacts.description: Number of unique contacts in current solution

effective_seed.description: Effective seed used for the current run.

elapsed_seconds.description: Time elapsed since solver started (in seconds)

local_optima_escapes.description: Number of local optima escapes (accepted worse moves)

move_policy.description: Effective move policy used for the current run.

overall_acceptance_rate.description: Overall acceptance rate (accepted moves / total moves)

reheats_performed.description: Number of reheats performed so far

score_variance.description: Score variance over recent window (indicates exploration level)

stop_reason.description: Explicit stop reason. Present on final progress updates and absent on intermediate updates.

swaps_accepted.description: Number of regular person swap moves accepted

swaps_rejected.description: Number of regular person swap moves rejected

swaps_tried.description: Number of regular person swap moves attempted

transfers_accepted.description: Number of single person transfer moves accepted

transfers_rejected.description: Number of single person transfer moves rejected

transfers_tried.description: Number of single person transfer moves attempted

MoveFamily.description: Explicit move families supported by the simulated annealing search loop.

MoveFamilyWeights.description: Explicit weights for each move family when `MoveSelectionMode::Weighted` is used.

MovePolicy.description: Controls which move families are allowed in a run and how the solver chooses between them.

allowed_families.description:
Optional allow-list of move families for this run.

When omitted, all move families are allowed.

forced_family.description:
Optional single-family override used for path tests and diagnostics.

When present, the search loop will only attempt the specified move family.

weights.description: Optional explicit family weights used when `mode` is `weighted`.

MoveSelectionMode.description: Selection mode for mixed move-family search.

oneOf.description: Preserve the current solver behavior, where transfer / clique swap probabilities are derived from the current state.
Use caller-provided explicit weights instead of the adaptive heuristics.

StopReason.description: Explicit reason why a solver run stopped.
